name: Clara AI — Pipeline A: Demo Call → v1 Agent

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Optional: runs automatically. For manual runs use 'Execute Workflow' trigger.

nodes.name: Read Demo Files
nodes.notes: Reads all files from dataset/demo directory

nodes.name: Transcribe + Extract (Audio)
nodes.notes: Runs Whisper transcription then extraction for audio files

nodes.name: Extract from Transcript
nodes.notes: Runs rule-based extraction on text transcript

nodes.name: Create Tracker Task
nodes.notes: Logs to local tasks.json. Optionally creates GitHub Issue if GITHUB_TOKEN is set.

parameters.message: Pipeline A SUCCESS: {{ $json.account_id }} ({{ $json.company_name }}) — v1 memo and spec generated.

_description: Pipeline A: Ingests demo call transcripts/audio, extracts structured Account Memo v1, generates Retell Agent Spec v1, creates tracker task. Zero-cost: uses local Python scripts for all processing.
